student_baseline.name: Student Baseline (YOLOv8n)
student_baseline.description: Original YOLOv8 nano model trained without knowledge distillation

student_distilled.name: Hierarchical YOLOv5 (Distilled)
student_distilled.description: Final ultra-efficient YOLOv5 model distilled through the Model Ladder

teacher_model.name: Super-Teacher (YOLOv8m)
teacher_model.description: Teacher model trained on high-fidelity Grounded SAM labels

ensemble.name: Consensus Ensemble (v8m + v8n + v5n)
ensemble.description: High-precision mode: 99% precision goal by requiring consensus between multiple models

performance_notes.distillation_benefits: Knowledge distillation transfers teacher knowledge to smaller student model, improving accuracy with minimal parameter increase
performance_notes.filtering_benefits: Contourlet filtering enhances image quality and features relevant to root canal pathology detection
